entries.name: drawio:auto-documenter
entries.intent: Automated documentation agent that generates diagrams from code analysis and keeps them synchronized

entries.name: drawio:data-connector
entries.intent: Data binding specialist for conditional formatting, live data integration, and dynamic diagram updates

entries.name: drawio:diagram-architect
entries.intent: Expert architect that selects optimal diagram types and generates production-quality draw.io XML

entries.name: drawio:enrichment-researcher
entries.intent: Deep research agent that enriches diagrams with codebase analysis and web-sourced intelligence

entries.name: drawio:integration-specialist
entries.intent: Platform integration expert for embedding diagrams across GitHub, Confluence, Azure DevOps, Notion, Teams, and Harness

entries.name: drawio:style-engineer
entries.intent: Visual design specialist for draw.io diagram styling, theming, and professional appearance
